# PAC MT5 Expert Advisor

Implementable PAC strategy in MQL5. See `../../strategy_ea.md` for the
behavioural spec and `../../../PAC/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-27-plan-5-mql5-ea-design.md`
(in the scratch workspace) for the implementation design.

**Install + workflow:** filled in by Task 22 at end of Plan 5.

**Generated files:** `Include/PAC/PAC_Config.mqh` and `Presets/*.set` are
auto-generated by `tools/python_config_to_mql5_set.py` — do not hand-edit.
